## Fact-check notes
- Stanford 2026 AI Index reports generative AI at 53% global population adoption three years in, with 70% of companies deploying it in at least one function (Source: Stanford AI Index 2026 via Asanify digest)
- Salesforce and ServiceNow both launched dedicated autonomous agent hubs in April 2026, with Salesforce building on Agentforce and ServiceNow expanding Now Assist into a full agent orchestration layer (Source: Auton AI News, April 20 2026)
- EY, Oracle, Salesforce, Hyland, and Microsoft all shipped production-grade agentic AI deployments in April 2026, coordinating multi-agent workflows across audit, engineering, manufacturing, and operations (Source: Fifth Row blog, April 2026)
- Infor Enterprise AI Adoption Impact Index surveyed 1,000 business decision-makers across the US, UK, Germany, and France, finding more than half of businesses struggle to scale AI (Source: Infor press release, April 22 2026)
